summary.intent: Fix five Codex review findings on PR #724 in fogodev/ars-ui, push the fixes, reply to and resolve each review thread, then re-trigger Codex review.
summary.outcome: All five review fixes were committed (9bbd3855), pushed, replied to with precise inline comments, and the threads were resolved. A follow-up formatting-only commit was applied after CI failed the rustfmt check. The @codex review trigger was successfully posted after two transient GitHub API connection failures.

repo: ars-ui uses a monorepo with separate Leptos and Dioxus adapter crates under crates/ars-leptos and crates/ars-dioxus
Fieldset descriptions must register/unregister with the fieldset machine in both adapters to keep aria-describedby in sync
Leptos Field Input requires prop:value binding (not a generic HTML value attr) for controlled value updates
Dioxus Field must subscribe to parent Form context_version before merging validation errors so fields reflect form-level validation_errors changes
Fieldset must publish inherited disabled, readonly, and invalid state; Field merges that state into descendant input attrs in both adapters
Leptos Form derives data-ars-state and aria-busy from live machine state
The repo uses cargo xclippy as a custom Clippy wrapper alias
CI runs a rustfmt check step and skips the rest of the matrix on formatting failure
Commit hooks involve Rust checks and can be slow/silent for over a minute before producing output

code.finding: Fieldset description registration/unregistration and inherited state (disabled, readonly, invalid) publishing added here
Fieldset description registration/unregistration and inherited state publishing added here
WASM tests added for fieldset and field inherited state behavior
WASM tests added for Leptos controlled value updates (prop:value) and Form submit busy attrs

workflow: GitHub GraphQL API can be used to fetch and resolve PR review threads via resolveReviewThread mutation
Inline PR comment replies are posted via gh api -X POST repos/.../pulls/.../comments with in_reply_to parameter
@codex review is triggered by posting a PR comment with that exact string
Transient GitHub API connection errors may require retry; retrying the same gh command is sufficient
cargo fmt --all applies formatting; cargo fmt --all -- --check verifies without modifying
Formatting-only commits should be committed and pushed separately so CI reruns from a clean head

friction: Commit hooks were slow and silent for over a minute, requiring repeated waiting with no feedback
The @codex review comment failed twice with transient GitHub API connection errors before succeeding on the third attempt
CI failed the entire matrix by skipping remaining jobs after the rustfmt check failed, requiring an additional formatting-only commit and push cycle
open_items: Codex re-review result not yet confirmed — new review threads may open on the formatting-fixed head
PR #724 merge readiness depends on Codex re-review passing and CI completing successfully on the latest push
